labels.shortDescription: BU Batch Run for Last N days
Cancelled ready for billing popup message
labels.value: Since the cancellation quote balance is not equal to $0, the quote has been submitted to Billing for further process.
Previously lost opp is relevant again!
Panel Acquisition Community
Looks like the contact has special characters in their name. Please update the contact's name with English letters and numbers only.

NA Strategic - Sales:NA Enterprise - Sales:NA SMB - Sales:EMEA Strategic Sales:EMEA Enterprise - Sales:EMEA Inside Sales - Sales:France - Sales:Agencies Strategic - Sales:Agencies Independent - Sales:Investors APAC & EMEA - Sales:Investors America - Sales:Investors Strategic - Sales:Japan - Sales:APAC Strategic - Sales:APAC EM - Sales:APAC Inside Sales - CSM:APAC Inside Sales - Sales:LATAM Inside Sales - CSM:LATAM Inside Sales - Sales:OEM - Sales:Agencies Independent - CSM:Investors America - CSM:Investors Strategic - CSM:APAC Strategic - CSM:APAC EM - CSM:APAC Inside Sales - CSM:LATAM Inside Sales - CSM:OEM - CSM

Please wait for the quote metrics to finish calculating and try again

labels.shortDescription: Excluded Lead RecordType For BU Batch
Generate Contract send contract is missing error
labels.value: Please make sure to fill in the Countersignature Date field with the date on which the contract will be sent to the client
IS4U@similarweb.com

Opportunity_Stage_Flow
The email was not sent to the customer please contact Salesopps.
You must select a contact that will receive the renewal email and link
The renewal email was successfully sent to the customer
Good Job! The quote will be pending until we get verification from Deal Desk team that the customer successfully transferred us the fee for the subscription.
Ready for billing

labels.shortDescription: Record has been modified by Zuora package
labels.value: Record has been modified by Zuora package. Please refresh the page.
Equity Research:Hedge Funds and Asset Management:Investment Banking:Investors:VC and Private:Equity:Venture Capital
https://similarweb.lightning.force.com

labels.shortDescription: Advisory Services Skip button help text
labels.value: If you select "Skip" at this step, you will not have the option to submit the quote to Zuora, the quote will go to Billing which may delay the subscription activation.

labels.shortDescription: Updated ready for billing popup message
labels.value: Great! The quote was submitted to Deal Desk. Once Deal Desk processes the quote - access will be granted.
/apex/apex/quoteEnhancement?crmAccountId=[AccId]&oppId=[OppId]&quoteType=Subscription&stepNumber=1

labels.shortDescription: duplicate id in Zuora Package Error msg
labels.value: The subscription version has more than one renewal quote. Please delete all renewal quotes that were not Sent to Zuora and create a new quote.
There is an issue with the payment term that was set in the quote, please review, update and try again. For any additional help - reach out to Salesops@similarweb.com
Please set the Business Unit and Country before re-assigning
